description_long: This is a cordless reciprocating saw, primarily black with blue accents and a robust, ergonomic handle. The body is constructed from durable plastic with visible texturing for grip, and it features a prominent trigger button within the handle area. The tool is branded with the Kobalt logo and '24V Max' text, indicating its battery-powered nature, with a large battery pack attached at the base. The front end has a metal blade clamp and a reciprocating saw blade attached, designed for cutting through wood, metal, or plastic. Ventilation slots are visible on the body, and the overall design is streamlined for handheld operation in construction or demolition tasks.
description: A black and blue cordless reciprocating saw with a Kobalt logo, ergonomic handle, and visible battery pack. It features a metal blade clamp and attached saw blade for heavy-duty cutting.
description_view_0: Side view showing the Kobalt logo, battery pack, ergonomic handle, and the full length of the saw with blade attached.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the metal blade clamp and saw blade, with the tool's body receding into the background.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the battery pack, handle, and the '24V Max' branding, with the blade and clamp visible at the front.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the battery pack and handle, with the body of the saw extending forward and the blade barely visible.
